message:
test(schedule-trace): add 42 unit tests for schedule trace module

Covers: TraceConfig defaults, ScheduleTrace default impl, set_tick/advance_tick,
unlimited entries, queue state recording without auto_snapshot, snapshot
sampling summary/logs presence, clear resetting seq/sampler, empty-trace
checksum, checksum_hex format, GoldenCompareResult variants,
SchedulerPolicy Display all variants, TraceSummary fields (yields/wakeups/
failures/ticks), JSONL format for all event types (Yield, Failed, Custom,
QueueSnapshot, Start, Complete, Cancelled with Shutdown/Other), wakeup
reason variants (UserAction, Explicit, Other), IsomorphismProof builder
with/without approval, entry seq/tick in JSONL, multi-line JSONL output,
snapshot_change_threshold, PolicyChange/Custom in checksum.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
